channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ADC Demands INEC Chairman’s Resignation Over Alleged Bias and Constitutional Breach
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) is calling for the immediate resignation or removal of Professor Joseph Amupitan, the Chairman of the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC), accusing h...

item.title: Tanzania Gemological Centre provides practical gemstone processing training to youth
item.description: The Tanzania Gemological Centre (TGC) in Arusha has launched affordable training programs aimed at equipping young people and other stakeholders with practical skills in gemstone and rock processing. ...

item.title: Kenya Maintains Neutral Stance Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Kenya has officially reaffirmed its neutral position regarding the escalating conflict in the Middle East, responding to recent criticism from the Iranian government. The Iranian Embassy in Nairobi ha...

item.title: House impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte to continue on April 14
item.description: The impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte will continue as scheduled, according to Speaker Faustino 'Bojie' Dy III. This comes after the Supreme Court did not issue a temporary r...

item.title: Rising Global Economic Imbalances Pose Risks to Stability
item.description: Global economic imbalances, particularly the widening U.S. current account deficit and corresponding surpluses in China, oil-producing countries, and the eurozone, have intensified since the COVID-19 ...

item.title: Ontario drivers to see 12 cent per litre reduction in gas prices this Friday
item.description: Gasoline prices in Ontario are projected to decrease by approximately 12 cents per litre this Friday, according to the president of Affordable Energy. This anticipated reduction comes amid fluctuating...

item.title: One Nation's Struggle to Address Its Leadership Issues
item.description: Ahead of the 2017 Western Australian election, Patrick Marlborough reflects on an interview with John Zurakowski, a young One Nation candidate for Baldivis. Zurakowski, at just 20 years old, seemed un...

item.title: Nearly 2,000 Aspiring Doctors Pass March 2026 Physicians Licensure Exam
item.description: The Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) just announced that 1,954 out of 2,781 individuals successfully passed the March 2026 physicians licensure examination. The exam was administered across se...

item.title: Lee Andrews, Katie Price's Husband, Claims He's Buying Chelsea FC Despite Financial Questions
item.description: Lee Andrews, the Dubai-based businessman and husband of Katie Price, has made ambitious claims about his intention to buy Chelsea FC, a mere four years after Todd Boehly’s consortium acquired the club...

item.title: Marcos thanks Mexican donor for Our Lady of Guadalupe images for nationwide pilgrimage
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. expressed his gratitude to Mexican philanthropist Victor González Herrera for donating devotional images of Our Lady of Guadalupe to the Philippines. Accordin...

item.title: Government appoints interim Ogra chairman over concerns about oil supply and pricing oversight
item.description: The federal government has removed Shahzad Iqbal from his temporary position as acting chairman of the Oil and Gas Regulatory Authority (Ogra) amid persistent challenges in the oil supply chain and co...

item.title: Challenges of CNG Bus System at OAU: Long Waits and Increased Transport Costs for Students
item.description: Obafemi Awolowo University (OAU) recently introduced 50 CNG buses and 30 tricycles to its transport system in an effort to reduce costs and promote cleaner energy. However, this change has led to long...

item.title: US Ambassador Bozell expresses admiration for South Africa as Ramaphosa emphasises diplomatic conduct
item.description: US Ambassador to South Africa, Leo Brent Bozell III, has expressed his admiration for the country after only two months in office, stating that he has 'fallen in love' with South Africa. This follows ...

item.title: San Diego Considers Tax on Vacant Homes to Address Housing Shortage
item.description: San Diego is preparing to vote in June on a proposed vacant home tax that could target roughly 5,000 empty properties across the city. The measure would impose an $8,000 annual tax on homes left unocc...

item.title: ‘The Drama’: Exploring guilt, perception, and the darkness of thought in a modern relationship
item.description: ‘The Drama’ is a thought-provoking dark comedy directed by Kristoffer Borgli, revolving around a young couple, Emma (Zendaya) and Charlie (Robert Pattinson), whose impending wedding plans are disrupte...

item.title: Namakkal resident sentenced to two years RI and fined ₹24.8 crore for evading income tax
item.description: In Coimbatore, the Chief Judicial Magistrate Court has sentenced B. Faiyaz Ahamed, a resident of Paramathi Velur in Namakkal district, to two years of rigorous imprisonment for violation of income tax...

item.title: 1,954 Pass the April 2026 Physicians Licensure Exam
item.description: The Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) has officially announced the results of the April 2026 Physicians Licensure Examination. Out of the 2,781 examinees, 1,954 passed the rigorous exam held ac...

item.title: Promising New Therapy for Children with Rare and Aggressive Cancers
item.description: The article likely discusses a newly developed treatment that has shown potential in helping children suffering from rare and aggressive forms of cancer. Although details are unavailable due to access...

item.title: IMF Study Shows War Causes Greater Long-Term Economic Damage than Natural Disasters or Debt Crises
item.description: New research from the International Monetary Fund (IMF) highlights that wars have a more severe and lasting impact on national economies than natural disasters or sovereign debt crises. The study anal...

item.title: Edo State Deputy Governor’s Mother Passes Away at 95
item.description: Madam Esther Imaguomwanruo, the mother of Edo State Deputy Governor Dennis Idahosa, don pass away on Wednesday, April 8, 2026, for Benin City. She die at the age of 95 after small sickness wey no too ...
